nasb.text: Then the men of Israel besides Benjamin were numbered, 400,000 men who draw the sword; all these were men of war.

esv.text: And the men of Israel, apart from Benjamin, mustered 400,000 men who drew the sword; all these were men of war.

cnv.text: 除了便雅憫人以外，以色列人被數點的，共有四十萬拿刀的，個個都是戰士。

ccb.text: 其他十一个以色列支派则召集了四十万善战的刀兵。
